attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
	(RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SCPO.PROJECT_ORG_ID) + SM.MAX_KEY) AS COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_KEY,
	SCPO.PROJECT_ORG_ID AS SK_PRJCT_ORG_ID_INT,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CO_PROJECT_ORG SCPO,
	(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_KEY),0) AS MAX_KEY
	 FROM    $$ETLVWDB.SM_COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT) SM
WHERE 1=1
	AND NOT EXISTS
	 ( SELECT 1
	   FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT SM1
	   WHERE  SCPO.PROJECT_ORG_ID = SM1.SK_PRJCT_ORG_ID_INT
	 )

SELECT
BATCH_ID,
PROJECT_ORG_ID,
PROJECT_ID,
ORG_ID,
CREATED_BY,
CREATED_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATED_DATE,
ORG_TYPE,
ORG_MFR,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CO_PROJECT_ORG ECPO
WHERE ECPO.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI' 
AND  NOT EXISTS 
				(
					SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CO_PROJECT_ORG SCPO
					WHERE ECPO.PROJECT_ORG_ID = SCPO.PROJECT_ORG_ID
				)

SELECT
COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_KEY,
INV_ORG_MFG_TYPE,
SK_PRJCT_ORG_ID_INT,
CREATE_DTM,
DV_CREATE_DT,
LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
DV_LAST_UPDATE_DT,
ORG_TYPE_CD,
CREATED_BY_AUTO_TEST_FLG,
UPDATED_BY_AUTO_TEST_FLG,
BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME,
SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
CREATED_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
LAST_UPD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
RU_INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY,
EDW_CREATE_DTM,
EDW_CREATE_USER,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
EDW_UPDATE_USER,
START_TV_DT,
END_TV_DT,
RU_MFTRNG_OEM_SUP_PTY_KEY ,
RU_BK_MFTRNG_LOC_NAME ,
ACTION_CODE,
DML_TYPE

FROM
(
	SELECT
	TOT.COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_KEY,
	TOT.INV_ORG_MFG_TYPE,
	TOT.SK_PRJCT_ORG_ID_INT,
	TOT.CREATE_DTM ,
	TOT.DV_CREATE_DT ,
	TOT.LAST_UPDATE_DTM ,
	TOT.DV_LAST_UPDATE_DT ,
	TOT.ORG_TYPE_CD ,
	TOT.CREATED_BY_AUTO_TEST_FLG  ,
	TOT.UPDATED_BY_AUTO_TEST_FLG,
	TOT.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME,
	TOT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG ,
	TOT.CREATED_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY  ,
	TOT.LAST_UPD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY ,
	TOT.RU_INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY ,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER ,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
	TOT.START_TV_DT AS START_TV_DT,
	COALESCE(MAX(TOT.START_TV_DT - INTERVAL '1' DAY) OVER (PARTITION BY TOT.COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_KEY ORDER BY TOT.START_TV_DT
			ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01') AS END_TV_DT,
	TOT.RU_MFTRNG_OEM_SUP_PTY_KEY ,
	TOT.RU_BK_MFTRNG_LOC_NAME ,
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TOT.COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_KEY ORDER BY TOT.START_TV_DT ASC) AS RANK_INDEX,
	TOT.ACTION_CODE ,
	(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND (NCPOAT.COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_KEY IS NOT NULL) THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE

	FROM
	(
		SELECT
		TIN.COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_KEY,
		TIN.INV_ORG_MFG_TYPE,
		TIN.SK_PRJCT_ORG_ID_INT,
		TIN.CREATE_DTM ,
		TIN.DV_CREATE_DT ,
		TIN.LAST_UPDATE_DTM ,
		TIN.DV_LAST_UPDATE_DT ,
		TIN.ORG_TYPE_CD ,
		TIN.CREATED_BY_AUTO_TEST_FLG  ,
		TIN.UPDATED_BY_AUTO_TEST_FLG,
		TIN.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME,
		TIN.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG ,
		TIN.CREATED_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY  ,
		TIN.LAST_UPD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY ,
		TIN.RU_INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY ,
		TIN.START_TV_DT AS START_TV_DT ,
		TIN.RU_MFTRNG_OEM_SUP_PTY_KEY ,
		TIN.RU_BK_MFTRNG_LOC_NAME,
		TIN.ACTION_CODE AS ACTION_CODE,
		TIN.CREATE_DATETIME AS CREATE_DATETIME,
		ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TIN.COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_KEY,TIN.INV_ORG_MFG_TYPE, TIN.SK_PRJCT_ORG_ID_INT,TIN.ORG_TYPE_CD ,
										TIN.CREATED_BY_AUTO_TEST_FLG ,TIN.UPDATED_BY_AUTO_TEST_FLG ,
										TIN.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME ,TIN.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
										TIN.CREATED_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY ,TIN.LAST_UPD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY ,TIN.RU_INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY
							ORDER BY CREATE_DATETIME DESC) AS ROW_NUM

		FROM
		(
				SELECT
				SM.COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_KEY AS COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_KEY,
				CASE WHEN SCPO.ORG_MFR ='O'THEN 'INVENTORY ORGANIZATION'
					 WHEN SCPO.ORG_MFR ='M' THEN 'MANUFACTURING ORGANIZATION'
					 ELSE 'UNKNOWN'
				END INV_ORG_MFG_TYPE,
				COALESCE(SM.SK_PRJCT_ORG_ID_INT,-999) AS SK_PRJCT_ORG_ID_INT,
				SCPO.CREATED_DATE AS CREATE_DTM,
				CAST(SCPO.CREATED_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_CREATE_DT,
				SCPO.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
				CAST(SCPO.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_LAST_UPDATE_DT,
				CASE WHEN SCPO.ORG_TYPE='B' THEN 'BOARD BUILD'
					WHEN SCPO.ORG_TYPE='D' THEN 'DIRECT FULFILLMENT'
					WHEN SCPO.ORG_TYPE='F' THEN 'FINAL ASSEMBLY AND TEST'
					ELSE 'UNKNOWN'
				END ORG_TYPE_CD,
				CASE WHEN SCPO.CREATED_BY='AUTOTEST'THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END CREATED_BY_AUTO_TEST_FLG,
				CASE WHEN SCPO.LAST_UPDATED_BY='AUTOTEST' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END UPDATED_BY_AUTO_TEST_FLG,
				COALESCE(NCP.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME,
				'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
				COALESCE(NCWPC.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS CREATED_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
				COALESCE(NCWPU.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS LAST_UPD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
				CASE WHEN SCPO.ORG_MFR ='O' THEN NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY ELSE -999 END RU_INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY,
				CAST(SCPO.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS DATE ) START_TV_DT ,
				'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
				SCPO.CREATE_DATETIME AS CREATE_DATETIME,
				COALESCE(NMS.MFTRNG_OEM_SUP_PTY_KEY,-999) AS RU_MFTRNG_OEM_SUP_PTY_KEY ,
				COALESCE(NMS.BK_MFTRNG_LOC_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_BK_MFTRNG_LOC_NAME
				FROM
				$$STGDB.ST_CO_PROJECT_ORG SCPO
				INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT SM
				ON  COALESCE(SCPO.PROJECT_ORG_ID,-999) = SM.SK_PRJCT_ORG_ID_INT
				INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COO_PROJECT NCP
				ON COALESCE(SCPO.PROJECT_ID,-999) = NCP.SK_PROJECT_ID_INT
				LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWPC
				ON COALESCE(SCPO.CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') = NCWPC.CEC_ID
				LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWPU
				ON COALESCE(SCPO.LAST_UPDATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') = NCWPU.CEC_ID
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
				ON COALESCE(SCPO.ORG_ID,-999) = NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
				
				LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCMF_EM_LOC EXEL
				ON SM.SK_PRJCT_ORG_ID_INT = EXEL.SITE_ID
				
				LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCMF_EM_SUPPLIER_LOC EXESL
				 ON  (EXEL.SITE_ID = EXESL.SITE_ID
				 AND SCPO.ORG_MFR='M'
				 AND EXEL.STATUS ='ACTIVE')
								
				LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MANUFACTURING_SITE NMS
				ON EXEL.LOCATION = NMS.BK_MFTRNG_LOC_NAME
				
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
				ON (COALESCE(EXEL.COUNTRY,'UN') = NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
				And COALESCE(NMS.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK') = NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE)

				UNION ALL
				SELECT
				COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_KEY,
				INV_ORG_MFG_TYPE,
				SK_PRJCT_ORG_ID_INT,
				CREATE_DTM,
				DV_CREATE_DT,
				LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
				DV_LAST_UPDATE_DT,
				ORG_TYPE_CD,
				CREATED_BY_AUTO_TEST_FLG,
				UPDATED_BY_AUTO_TEST_FLG,
				BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME,
				SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
				CREATED_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
				LAST_UPD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
				RU_INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY,
				START_TV_DT,
				'X' AS ACTION_CODE,
				EDW_UPDATE_DTM AS CREATE_DATETIME,
				RU_MFTRNG_OEM_SUP_PTY_KEY ,
				RU_BK_MFTRNG_LOC_NAME 
				FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_TV NCPOAT
				WHERE EXISTS
							( SELECT 1
							   FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT SM1
							   WHERE  NCPOAT.SK_PRJCT_ORG_ID_INT = SM1.SK_PRJCT_ORG_ID_INT
							)
				AND NCPOAT.END_TV_DT=16000101

		) TIN
		QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TIN.COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_KEY,TIN.START_TV_DT ORDER BY TIN.CREATE_DATETIME DESC) =1
	)TOT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_TV NCPOAT
ON NCPOAT.COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_KEY = TOT.COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT_KEY
AND NCPOAT.END_TV_DT = 16000101
WHERE ROW_NUM = 1
) A

SELECT
BATCH_ID,
PROJECT_ORG_ID,
PROJECT_ID,
ORG_ID,
CREATED_BY,
CREATED_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATED_DATE,
ORG_TYPE,
ORG_MFR,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CO_PROJECT_ORG SCPO


WHERE  NOT EXISTS 
 (SELECT 1 
    FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_COO_PRJCT_ORG_ASGMT SM
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COO_PROJECT NCP
	ON SCPO.PROJECT_ID = NCP.SK_PROJECT_ID_INT
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
	ON NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT  = SCPO.ORG_ID	
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWPC
	ON  COALESCE(SCPO.CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') = NCWPC.CEC_ID
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWPU
	ON COALESCE(SCPO.LAST_UPDATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') = NCWPU.CEC_ID
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCMF_EM_LOC EXEL
	ON SM.SK_PRJCT_ORG_ID_INT = EXEL.SITE_ID
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCMF_EM_SUPPLIER_LOC EXESL
	ON (EXEL.SITE_ID = EXESL.SITE_ID
	AND SCPO.ORG_MFR='M'
	AND EXEL.STATUS ='ACTIVE')				
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MANUFACTURING_SITE NMS
	ON EXEL.LOCATION = NMS.BK_MFTRNG_LOC_NAME
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
	ON (COALESCE(EXEL.COUNTRY,'UN') = NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
	AND NMS.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE)
	
	WHERE SCPO.PROJECT_ORG_ID = SM.SK_PRJCT_ORG_ID_INT
)
